output: Welcome to GSP! Start by registering for a 'Intro to Coding' event to earn your first 50 XP.
Your leadership skills are growing! Host a small club meeting to reach Level 6 and earn a 'Community Builder' badge.
Expert level reached. Use your Engineering certificates to mentor freshmen and earn exclusive 'Mentor' points.
7 days of consistency! Don't stop now—attend a dance workshop today to keep your streak alive.
Time to showcase your skills! Complete a certified workshop this weekend to populate your certificate gallery.
Score big! Join the local sports meet this Friday to earn points and meet fellow athletes.
GSP Legend! Your 30-day streak is the highest in your department. You've set the bar high for everyone.
Find your rhythm. The 'Campus Band' is looking for members—join them for a 30 XP boost.
Small steps lead to big rewards. Attend one more seminar today to double your daily point multiplier.
The future of science is you! Log your research hours as an event to gain 'Academic Excellence' points.
Impressive portfolio! Share your 3 certificates on the leaderboard to increase your visibility among recruiters.
Heart of gold! Sign up for the 'Beach Cleanup' event to earn 50 XP and a 'Nature Hero' badge.
Level Up! Your 14-day streak in the Gaming Club has unlocked a special avatar border.
Final lap! Attend the 'Entrepreneurship Summit' to network and finish your senior year as a Level 5 leader.
Canvas awaits! Register for the 'Digital Art Expo' to kickstart your GSP journey with 100 bonus XP.
